text: Most financial compliance software feels older than his computer.
It's slow, painful, and by modern standards, totally broken.
We raised 20 million to launch Greenboard Go, the first fully generalized AI for financial
compliance designed to make everyone in finance a compliance champion.
In 2023, we started Greenboard with the belief that compliance could finally be fixed by pairing
AI Recall with Human Precision.
Since then, we've painstakingly built Greenboard, use case by use case, on top of 17A4 and
worm compliant books and records, building a foundation for AI that can power every
compliance workflow.
We've built best in class tools for employee compliance, marketing compliance, communications
archiving, third party diligence, and much more.
But building against individual mission critical use cases was never the destination.
It's the foundation.
Greenboard Go, every employee in finance can access compliance at the speed of best in
class AI.
Review marketing, manage broker feeds, complete attestations and disclosures, bring your communications
on channel, and get policy guidance all in seconds.
The best part?
Greenboard Go is fully trained and supervised by your compliance team, so you can automatically
escalate anything unclear to the right person.
Let's face it, compliance has historically been painful.
It's high stakes, thankless and unclear, and building a culture of compliance is the hardest
part.
Greenboard Go empowers organizations to live and breathe compliance like never before.
Book a demo at Greenboard.com to learn more.
